title: AN ACT AMENDING ITEM (CB), PAGE 465, GROUP IV, SUBPARAGRAPH 29, FOR THE PROVINCE OF LEYTE, PARAGRAPH "C", SECTION TWO OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED TWENTY-SEVEN HUNDRED ONE.

chunks.text:
H. NO. 7373 / 65 OG No. 9, 2079 (March 3, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 5042, June 17, 1967 ]

AN ACT AMENDING ITEM (CB), PAGE 465, GROUP IV, SUBPARAGRAPH 29, FOR THE PROVINCE OF LEYTE, PARAGRAPH "C", SECTION TWO OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED TWENTY-SEVEN HUNDRED ONE.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item (cb), page 465, group IV, subparagraph 29 for the Province of Leyte, paragraph "c", Section two of Republic Act Numbered Twenty-seven hundred one is hereby amended to read as follows:

"(cb) Tigbao Bridge Tacloban City

ConstructionรขยยฆรขยยฆรขยยฆรขยยฆรขยยฆรขยยฆรขยยฆรขยยฆรขยยฆP100,000.00

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 17, 1967.
